◈ Onboarding SFX bespoke event-SFX · no music bed · budgeted

Onboarding SFX Audition

Each onboarding beat as a section: a mock animation on the audited timeline + its bespoke sound. Judge sound-against-visual. Peaks are authored; taps reuse the kit; the reel/gift are the tail. Turn your volume up.

IRONBIT · 25 synthesized cues · C-major band-limited chiptune · loudness ladder interaction < event < ceremony · deterministic (ops/gen_onboarding_sfx.py)
